snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ΏθΣΑ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter έΨ║ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram έΨ║https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook έΨ║https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-┬φfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentέΑβs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#Apekz #Bagsik #SecondSight9

About fliptopbattles:
FlipTop Kru Corp. is a self-produced events and artist management company with its first product in the FlipTop Battle League. The FlipTop Battle League is the PhilippinesέΑβ first premier έΑΥ and the worldέΑβs most-viewed έΑΥ rap battle league. It is popularly credited for the resurgence and widespread acceptance of hiphop culture in the Philippines since its inception in February 2010, and continues to champion all other hiphop elements in its variety of events and online content. It is home to the countryέΑβs top Hiphop talents and houses divisions in the main island groups of Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao.

snippet.title: Ά░ΧΉΛ╣Ήεν(KANG SEUNG YOON) - 'ΉΧΕΉζ┤ΉΧ╝ (IYAH)' M/V
snippet.description:
Ά░ΧΉΛ╣Ήεν(KANG SEUNG YOON) - 'ΉΧΕΉζ┤ΉΧ╝ (IYAH)'

ΉΧΕ ΈΓε Ήβε Ήζ┤Έθ┤Ά╣Ν?
ΈΓ┤Ήζ╝ΉζΑ ΉηαΊΧαΉηΡ
ΉΧιΉΞρ ΈπαΉζΕ ΈΜνΉηκΉΧΕΈ┤ΡΈΠΕ
ΉηΡΆ╛╕ΈπΝ ΉηΣΉΧΕΉπΕΈΜν

ΉΧ╝ ΉΜεΆ░ΕΉΧΕ ΉλΑΈπΝ
Ή▓εΉ▓εΊηΙ Ά░ΑΈζ╝
ΉγΦΉοα Έ╢ΑΉσΞ ΈΕΡ ΈΦ░Έζ╝Ά░ΑΆ╕░Ά░Α
Ήκ░Ά╕ΙΉΦσ Έ▓ΖΉ░ρΈΜν

ΉΜεΆ░ΕΉζ┤ ΉπΑΈΓαΈσ┤ ΉπΑΈΓιΉΙαΈκζ
ΉΕ╕ΉΔΒΉζΑ ΈΓ┤Ά▓Ν
ΈΞΦ ΈπΟΉζΑ Ά▒╕ Ά░ΧΉγΦΊΧ┤
ΈΓα ΊΧαΈΓαΈΠΕ ΊηαΈΥιΈΞ░
ΈΓαΈ│┤Ά│ι ΉΨ┤ΉσΝΈζ╝Ά│ι

ΈΓε ΉΧΕΉπΒ ΉΧΕΉζ┤ΉΧ╝Ήζ┤ΉΧ╝
Ήγ░Έου ΉΩΕΈπΙ ΈΙΙΉΩΦ
Έ│┤Ήζ┤ΈΛΦ Ά▓Ν ΈΜν ΉΧΕΈΜΙΉΧΕΈΜΙΉΧ╝
ΉΧΕΉπΒ ΉΨ┤Έο░ΈΞ░
ΉΜνΉΙα ΉλΑ ΊΧαΈσ┤ ΉΨ┤ΈΧΝ

ΈΩΡΈΜν ΉΔζΆ░ΒΊΧαΆ│ι ΈΤνΈΠΝΈσ┤
ΊΧεΉΙρΈπΝ ΈΓι Ά╕░ΈΜνΈο░ΈΜν

ABOUT PENCILMATION :
Pencilmation is a cartoon channel for everyone, especially not-too-serious grown-ups. It is made with love and a lot of fun by an international team helmed by Ross Bollinger who started the channel alone in his room a long time ago. Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

snippet.title: Jackson Wang Answers the Web's Most Searched Questions | WIRED

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

BLACKPINKήΒψήΑΒ2016ί╣┤8όεΙ8όΩξήΒτώθΥίδ╜ήΒπήΔΘήΔΥήΔξήΔ╝ήΓ╖ήΔπήΔ╝ήΓ▒ήΔ╝ήΓ╣ήΓΤϋκΝήΒΕήΑΒ

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube έΨ║ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

snippet.title: Harry Roque announces lockdown in NCR Plus 'bubble'
snippet.description: Presidential Spokesperson Harry Roque on Saturday, March 27, says that the Greater Manila area would be placed under an enhanced community quarantine in a bid to cut down the skyrocketing spread of COVID-19.

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: COVID IN OUR HOME | GARY VALENCIANO
snippet.description:
Hey everyone. HereέΑβs a little update about the news that came out regarding my wife. 
She is positive and I am negative. 
Thank you for all your prayers. 
I will skip any bike vlogs for this week as I think this is more important. 
LetέΑβs keep praying for our countrymen...especially those who have the virus but have no one with them and very little finances to sustain themselves through this. God bless us all.

snippet.title: Sana'y Di Nalang | (c) Bandang Lapis | #AgsuntaSongRequests ft. Peds Casilihan
snippet.description:
έΑεSanaέΑβy di nalang kita nakilala, sanaέΑβy di nalang kita nakasama..έΑζ ΏθΝΨέερΏθΝΛ

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesnέΑβt kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng έΑεSanaέΑβy di nalangέΑζ ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

snippet.title: Binibining Pilipinas inuudyukan na HUWAG NANG MAGPADALA ng Kandidata sa Miss Grand International
snippet.description: Malinaw ang sigaw ng sambayanang Pilipino sa Binibining Pilipinas Charities Incorporated at kay Madam Stella Araneta na itigil na ang pagpapadala ng ating mga kandidata sa Miss Grand International. Dahil sa ilang beses na umano tayong nananakawan ng korona sa nasabing Beauty Pageant ng Thailand, kagaya ni Samantha Bernardo at Nicole Cordovez, mas mabuti daw na wag nalang tayong magsayang ng panibagong binibini. May nagsasabi na kahit kailan daw ay hindi maaapreciate ng MGI Organization ang galing at talino ng mga kandidatang ipinanlalaban ng Pilipinas dahil bitter daw ang mga ito sa tagumpay ng ating bansa sa larangan ng Beauty Pageant. Pilipinas kase ang katangi-tanging bansa sa Southeast Asia na itinuturing na Power House. Pinas din ang pangalawa sa pinakamaraming  koronang naipanalo sa Big 4 Beauty Pageant.

snippet.title: TATAWA KAYO, MAIINIS AT TIYAK NA MAIIYAK!
snippet.description:
Part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=45xq0CN4O68&t=25s

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 16 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: OPM icon na si Claire dela Fuente pumanaw na | Headline Pilipinas
snippet.description:
Pumanaw na ang OPM icon na si Claire dela Fuente ngayong March 30 dahil sa cardiac arrest, kinumpirma ng anak nitong si Gigo de Guzman.

Na-admit sa ospital ang mang-aawit matapos magpositibo sa coronavirus.

snippet.title: 24 Oras Livestream: March 31, 2021 - Replay
snippet.description:
Here are the biggest news items on 24 Oras this Wednesday, March 31, 2021:

- PHA president says country already "lost" amid war against COVID-19

- NTF says country not yet lost on war against COVID-19 since no hospital closure were listed

- Health workers, medical frontliners voice out frustrations

- Senior citizen with COVID-19 dies right outside ER after no hospital could admit him

- PhilippinesέΑβ COVID-19 active cases climb to 130,245 with 6,128 new infections

- 19 year-old Fil-Am left blind in one eye after being shot in California

- PH Air Force patrolling  Julian Felipe Reef not cowered by Chinese ships despite 

- Grab too says έΑαlugawέΑβ is essential after riderέΑβs video goes viral

- Don't prejudge Ivermectin amid ongoing trials έΑΦUP prof

24 Oras is GMA NetworkέΑβs flagship newscast, anchored by Mike Enriquez, Mel Tiangco and Vicky Morales. It airs on GMA-7 Mondays to Fridays at 6:30 PM (PHL Time) and on weekends at 6:00 PM. For more videos from 24 Oras, visit http://www.gmanetwork.com/24oras.

snippet.title: Stranded cargo ship in Suez Canal could 'take weeks' to free | DW News
snippet.description:
Japanese media are reporting that the owner of a huge container ship blocking Egypt's Suez canal aims to free it by Saturday. But experts are warning it could take weeks. More than a hundred and fifty ships are waiting to get in to what is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with hundreds more headed its way. A prolonged suspension of traffic in the Suez will almost certainly impact global trade, which has already been hit hard by the pandemic. The Suez Canal is a choke-point for world-trade. It connects Asia and Europe and sees 30-percent of the global container-shipping-volume every day.
Dredging teams worked through the night to try to clear the canal bed around the 200,000 ton ship. The stranded Ever Given is holding up around 10 billion dollars in trade every day it is stuck.
Diggers, tugboats, dredgers and a crack team of Dutchmen known as the special forces of salvage operations have been drafted in to help. It's thought containers may have to be offloaded to lighten the vessel - though one mistake could spell disaster.
According to maritime historian Sal Mercogliano, "The bow is basically in Asia, the stern's in Africa, and the middle is in the middle of the canal. And what you can't do is take a lot of weight off the ends and put a lot of what they call a 'sagging stress' on the vessel. You could conceivably crack the hull, cause an oil spill. But worse, catastrophically fracture the vessel in half, which would close the canal for months, if not years, to salvage a vessel of that type."
150 ships are caught in the traffic jam. Each passing day piles on the pressure for global trade routes, already struggling with the coronavirus pandemic.
Those involved have warned it could be weeks before the vessel is freed. Bad news for those stuck in the world's longest maritime tailback.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Woman records on her phone as strange man stalks her through downtown Vancouver
snippet.description:
A Vancouver woman is speaking out about a frightening experience after she was followed closely by a strange man for more than half an hour.

Jamie Coutts filmed much of the encounter and said her stalker didnέΑβt appear phased by the camera at all.

Coutts said in retrospect she should have phoned police, but that in the stress of the moment her priority was getting somewhere safe and staying ahead of her pursuer.

Coutts has since reported the incident to Vancouver police, who say they are investigating.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7705868/frightening-video-man-follows-vancouver-woman/ 

Subscribe to Global News Channel HERE: http://bit.ly/20fcXDc

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaέΑΜ #FutureNostalgiaέΑΜ #Grammys

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:

Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time

snippet.title: NBA Trade Deadline 2021 LIVE
snippet.description:
NBA Trade Deadline 2021 is here as the deadline passes at 3p ET, Thursday, March 25th. NBA Trade Rumors & News are BUZZING following the Nikola Vucevic trade to the Chicago Bulls for Wendell Carter Jr., Otto Porter and 2 first round picks. Big-name players like Kyle Lowry, Lonzo Ball, Lauri Markkanen, Aaron Gordon and several other players could be on the move as they continue to be connected to NBA trade rumors. Chat Sports hosts Harrison Graham & Chase Senior are LIVE breaking down the latest NBA news & rumors on todayέΑβs 2021 NBA Trade Deadline Special.

SUBSCRIBE to Chat Sports as weέΑβll have all of NBA Trade Deadline 2021 coverage: https://www.youtube.com/chatsportstv?sub_confirmation=1

Kyle Lowry trade rumors are heating up as heέΑβs the top player on the NBA trade block. Shams Charania and Adrian Wojnarowski report that the Lakers, 76ers and Heat are all interested in trading for Lowry. The Orlando Magic are also taking calls on Nikola Vucevic and Terrence Ross as they appear to be sellers before the NBA Trade Deadline. Javale McGee, Cory Joseph and Delon Wright have already been traded today.

NBA Youngboy thinks he has all of the latest NBA trade rumors & news, but Chat Sports is LIVE on YouTube for the 2021 NBA Trade Deadline breaking down all of the trades that happen.

Trades happening today:
- Aaron Gordon trade to Denver for Gary Harris, RJ Hampton & a 1st Round Pick
- Nikola Vucevic trade to Chicago
- Nemanja Bjelica trade to Miami for Moe Harkless
- George Hill trade to 76ers in 3-team move with the Thunder & Knicks, including Terrance Ferguson
- Rajon Rondo trade to the Clippers for Lemon Pepper Lou Williams
- JJ Redick trade to the Mavs, along with Trey Lyles in a 3-team deal with the Spurs and Pelicans
- Victor Oladipo trade to the Heat

Follow our hosts on Twitter for more NBA rumors & news:
Harrison: http://twitter.com/hgrahamnfl
Chase: http://twitter.com/chase_senior

Check out our NBA-team specific YouTube Channels:
Los Angeles Lakers Report: https://www.youtube.com/lakerstv?sub_confirmation=1 
Golden State Warriors Today: https://www.youtube.com/Warriorstv?sub_confirmation=1
Boston Celtics Today: https://www.youtube.com/CelticsTV?sub_confirmation=1
Dallas Mavericks Today: https://www.youtube.com/Mavstv?sub_confirmation=1

Interact with Chat Sports on Social Media:
https://www.twitter.com/chatsports
https://www.instagram.com/chatsports
https://www.facebook.com/chatsports

For more NBA trade rumors & buzz, head over to http://chatsports.com/nba
